title: Adapted Tn-Seq Library Prep Protocol with Tagmentation
author: Emily Knebel

steps.title: Let the following components warm to room temperature
steps.instruction: Let the following components warm to room temperature: a. Bead-Linked Transposomes (BLT) b. Tagmentation Buffer (TB1)

steps.title: Once thawed, vortex both of these well
steps.instruction: Once thawed, vortex both of these well.

steps.title: Set up the thermocycler for the following custom Tag program
steps.instruction: Set up the thermocycler for the following custom Tag program: Preheat lid at 100˚C 55˚C for 15 mins Hold at 10˚C

steps.title: Prepare the tagmentation master mix (volumes...
steps.instruction: Prepare the tagmentation master mix (volumes account for residual) and multiply the number of samples used: a. 11 µl BLT b. 11 µl TB1

steps.title: Add 20 µl of the tagmentation...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µl of the tagmentation master mix to each 30 µl diluted sample of DNA in PCR tubes/96 well plate. Total reaction volume is 50 µl.

steps.title: Place tubes/plate in the thermocycler and...
steps.instruction: Place tubes/plate in the thermocycler and run the custom Tag program.

steps.title: Prepare the following buffer
steps.instruction: Prepare the following buffer: Tagmentation Stop Buffer (TSB)

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a. If the TSB precipitates, heat it to 37˚C for 10 minutes then vortex and cool to room temperature.

steps.title: Set up the following Stop Tagmentation...
steps.instruction: Set up the following Stop Tagmentation protocol on the thermocycler: a. Preheat lid at 100˚C b. 37˚C for 15 minutes c. Hold at 10 ˚C

steps.title: Add 10 µl of TSB to...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µl of TSB to each tube/well from tagmentation reaction

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a. Resuspend the beads by pipetting slowly 10 times

steps.title: Return tubes/plate to thermocycler and run the Stop Tag protocol
steps.instruction: Return tubes/plate to thermocycler and run the Stop Tag protocol.

steps.title: Place the tubes on a magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tubes on a magnetic rack and wait until the liquid clears ~2 – 5 mins

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Wash step:
steps.instruction: Wash step:

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a. Remove the tube/plate from magnetic stand.

steps.title: b
steps.instruction: b. Add 100 µl Tagmentation Wash Buffer to the beads, pipetting slowly to avoid foaming

steps.title: c
steps.instruction: c. Pipet slowly to resuspend

steps.title: d
steps.instruction: d. Place tubes/plate back on magnetic stand and wait until clears again

steps.title: e
steps.instruction: e. Remove & discard the supernatant

steps.title: Repeat the wash steps except do...
steps.instruction: Repeat the wash steps except do not remove supernatant at final step until ready for amplification!!

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a. Do not let the beads dry out!

steps.title: Thaw the Illumina enhanced PCR mix...
steps.instruction: Thaw the Illumina enhanced PCR mix (EPM), invert to mix and centrifuge. Thaw primers: Tn-specific Random Hybrid and Shortened Adaptor 1

steps.title: Set up the following program as...
steps.instruction: Set up the following program as Tn-Amplification 1 on the thermocycler

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a. Preheat lid to 100˚C

steps.title: b
steps.instruction: b. Start i. 68˚C 3:00 (min:sec) ii. 98˚C 3:00

steps.title: c
steps.instruction: c. First 5 cycles i. 98˚C 0:45 ii. 60˚C 0:45 iii. 68˚C 2:00

steps.title: d
steps.instruction: d. 15 more cycles i. 98˚C 0:15 ii. 62˚C 0:45 iii. 68˚C 0:30

steps.title: On the last cycle for the...
steps.instruction: On the last cycle for the final extension step, set it to be 10 minutes

steps.title: e
steps.instruction: e. Hold at 4˚C

steps.title: Prepare the Illumina Enhanced PCR (EPM)...
steps.instruction: Prepare the Illumina Enhanced PCR (EPM) Master mix and multiple each volume by the number of samples being used. (volumes account for residual) a. 22 µl EPM b. 22 µl nuclease-free water c. 5 µl Tn-specific hybrid primer d. 5 µl Shortened Adaptor 1 primer

steps.title: Vortex then centrifuge the master mix...
steps.instruction: Vortex then centrifuge the master mix to bring down droplets at 280 g for 10 seconds

steps.title: With bead-linked tagmented samples ready, remove...
steps.instruction: With bead-linked tagmented samples ready, remove & discard the supernatant while on the magnetic stand.

steps.title: Remove from magnet stand
steps.instruction: Remove from magnet stand

steps.title: Immediately add 50 µl of PCR...
steps.instruction: Immediately add 50 µl of PCR master mix to each sample tube/well

steps.title: Pipet to mix until fully resuspended...
steps.instruction: Pipet to mix until fully resuspended then centrifuge for 3 seconds. Place in thermocycler and run the Tn-Amplification 1 program

steps.title: Bring Ampure XP beads to room temperature
steps.instruction: Bring Ampure XP beads to room temperature. Thaw Resuspension Buffer (RSB) to room temp.

steps.title: Make 80% EtOH from pure ethanol stock
steps.instruction: Make 80% EtOH from pure ethanol stock

steps.title: Centrifuge the bead-linked transposome reaction after...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the bead-linked transposome reaction after amplification at 280 G x 1 min

steps.title: Place tubes/plate on magnetic stand and...
steps.instruction: Place tubes/plate on magnetic stand and wait until clears ~3 mins

steps.title: Transfer 45 µl of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer 45 µl of the supernatant to a microcentrifuge tube or 96 well ml deepwell storage (midi) plate

steps.title: Before bead cleanup – assess reaction...
steps.instruction: Before bead cleanup – assess reaction success by running the remaining 5 µl an agarose gel – add loading dye at appropriate ratio. Aim to see DNA of numerous sizes, most > 350 bp

steps.title: Vortex & invert the Ampure stock...
steps.instruction: Vortex & invert the Ampure stock solution before transferring 45 µl of these beads to each tube/well a. This accounts for a 1:1 ratio

steps.title: Pipet each tube/well ten times or...
steps.instruction: Pipet each tube/well ten times or on shaker for 1 min. a. Solution is viscous, pipet slowly

steps.title: Incubate at room temp for 5 mins
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temp for 5 mins

steps.title: Place tubes/plate on magnetic stand and allow to clear
steps.instruction: Place tubes/plate on magnetic stand and allow to clear

steps.title: Remove & discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove & discard the supernatant

steps.title: Wash the beads twice:
steps.instruction: Wash the beads twice:

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a. Add 200 µl of fresh 80% EtOH to the beads while they are on the magnet stand i. Do NOT mix or disturb beads!!

steps.title: b
steps.instruction: b. Incubate for 30 sec

steps.title: c
steps.instruction: c. Remove & discard the supernatant

steps.title: d
steps.instruction: d. Repeat for second wash

steps.title: e
steps.instruction: e. After second wash, all beads to air dry for 5-15 minutes

steps.title: Remove tubes from magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from magnetic stand. Add 32 µl of resuspension buffer and pipet to resuspend.

steps.title: Incubate at room temp for 2 mins
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temp for 2 mins

steps.title: Place back on magnet stand and allow to clear
steps.instruction: Place back on magnet stand and allow to clear

steps.title: Transfer 20 µl to a new...
steps.instruction: Transfer 20 µl to a new PCR tube/plate for each sample.

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a. Store remaining 10-12 µl of cleaned up library sample at -20˚C. It is safe to store purified samples for 1 month at -20˚C

steps.title: Thaw KAPA HiFi 2X Ready Mix,...
steps.instruction: Thaw KAPA HiFi 2X Ready Mix, invert several times to mix and centrifuge down briefly. Thaw primers: Adaptor 2 hybrid and Shortened Adaptor 1.

steps.title: Set up the following program as...
steps.instruction: Set up the following program as Tn-Amplification 2 on the thermocycler

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a. Preheat lid to 100˚C

steps.title: b
steps.instruction: b. Start i. 68˚C 3:00 (min:sec) ii. 98˚C 3:00

steps.title: d. Final cycle extension step
steps.instruction: d. Final cycle extension step: 68˚C for 1:00

steps.title: e
steps.instruction: e. Hold at 4˚C

steps.title: Prepare the PCR Master mix and...
steps.instruction: Prepare the PCR Master mix and multiple each volume by the number of samples being used. (volumes do not account for residual) a. 25 µl KAPA HiFi 2X ReadyMix b. 3 µl nuclease-free water c. 1 µl Adaptor 2 hybrid primer d. 1 µl Full-length Adaptor 1 primer

steps.title: Vortex then centrifuge the master mix...
steps.instruction: Vortex then centrifuge the master mix to bring down droplets at 280 g for 10 seconds.

steps.title: Add 30 µl of the master...
steps.instruction: Add 30 µl of the master mix to 20 µl of each library samples generated from first amplification.

steps.title: Place in thermocycler and run the Tn-Amplification 2 program
steps.instruction: Place in thermocycler and run the Tn-Amplification 2 program

steps.title: Add 1:1 volume (50 µl to...
steps.instruction: Add 1:1 volume (50 µl to 50 µl reaction volume) of room temperature Sample Purification Beads directly to each PCR reaction sample.

steps.title: Incubate 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate 15 minutes

steps.title: Place on magnetic rack and allow to clear
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic rack and allow to clear.

steps.title: Leave tube(s) on magnetic rack and...
steps.instruction: Leave tube(s) on magnetic rack and perform the 80% EtOH wash steps

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a. Add 200 µl of 80% EtOH to tubes without disturbing beads

steps.title: b
steps.instruction: b. Incubate 30 seconds then discard supernatant

steps.title: c
steps.instruction: c. Repeat for a total of two washes

steps.title: d
steps.instruction: d. Allow to air dry for 5 minutes then remove from magnetic stand

steps.title: Resuspend in either 32 µl of...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in either 32 µl of Resuspension buffer or EB Buffer (Tris-HCl pH 8-8.5)

steps.title: Place tubes on magnetic stand until clear
steps.instruction: Place tubes on magnetic stand until clear

steps.title: Transfer 20 µl the supernatant to...
steps.instruction: Transfer 20 µl the supernatant to a new tube without any beads.

steps.title: Store 10-12 µg of 2 nd round amplicons at -20˚C
steps.instruction: Store 10-12 µg of 2 nd round amplicons at -20˚C

steps.title: Thaw KAPA HiFi 2X Ready Mix,...
steps.instruction: Thaw KAPA HiFi 2X Ready Mix, invert several times to mix and centrifuge down briefly. Thaw primers: Adaptor 2 hybrid and Shortened Adaptor 1.

steps.title: Set up the following program as...
steps.instruction: Set up the following program as Tn-Amplification 3 on the thermocycler

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a. Preheat lid to 100˚C

steps.title: b
steps.instruction: b. Start i. 68˚C 3:00 (min:sec) ii. 98˚C 3:00

steps.title: d. Final cycle extension step
steps.instruction: d. Final cycle extension step: 68˚C for 1:00

steps.title: e
steps.instruction: e. Hold at 4˚C

steps.title: Prepare the PCR Master mix and...
steps.instruction: Prepare the PCR Master mix and multiple each volume by the number of samples being used. (volumes do not account for residual) a. 25 µl KAPA HiFi 2X ReadyMix b. 3 µl nuclease-free water

steps.title: Vortex then centrifuge the master mix...
steps.instruction: Vortex then centrifuge the master mix to bring down droplets at 280 g for 10 seconds.

steps.title: Add appropriate index adaptors to each...
steps.instruction: Add appropriate index adaptors to each sample using the Adaptor Pooling Guide a. 1 µl Index with i7 b. 1 µl Index with i5 c. Alternatively: 2.5 µl of each i7 and i5 index and 0 µl H2O to master mix

steps.title: Add 30 µl of the master...
steps.instruction: Add 30 µl of the master mix to 20 µl of each library samples generated from second amplification.

steps.title: Mix by pipetting then spin down
steps.instruction: Mix by pipetting then spin down. Place in thermocycler and run the Tn-Amplification 3 program

steps.title: Repeat Clean-Up as Previously listed in steps 45-51
steps.instruction: Repeat Clean-Up as Previously listed in steps 45-51

steps.title: Store 10-12 µl of 3 rd round amplicons at -20˚C
steps.instruction: Store 10-12 µl of 3 rd round amplicons at -20˚C

steps.title: Individually or in combination, take 5...
steps.instruction: Individually or in combination, take 5 µl of each library, vortex & centrifuge. Quantify by Qubit (follow manufacturer instructions for preparation).

steps.title: Submit 20 – 30 µl of...
steps.instruction: Submit 20 – 30 µl of final sample for fragment analysis and sequencing on appropriate platform.
